text:
Mrs. Locksnipe is a teacher appearing in Attack on Playtime, the seventh short story of Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Mrs. Locksnipe is a tall blond woman who wears a red tracksuit.

Story

Mrs. Locksnipe is the sport teacher at Hodge's school. When the latter arrives in gym class with a Titan but without the proper outfit, Mrs. Locksnipe tells her she will be punished, but she is eaten by the Titan.
